name: Quave Cloud
description: Monitor security settings and app environments in Quave Cloud

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Your user token from Quave Cloud Profile page.

credentialFields.label: Account ID (leave blank to check all accounts)
credentialFields.helpText: To scope checks to a single account, paste your Account ID here. Find it in Quave Cloud dashboard. Leave blank to scan all accounts.

credentialFields.label: App IDs (optional - comma-separated)
credentialFields.helpText: To check only specific apps or environments, enter their App IDs or App Env IDs separated by commas. Leave blank to check all.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all Quave Cloud accounts accessible with the provided token

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Checks SSL, firewall, and security settings for all app environments

checks.name: TLS / HTTPS
checks.description: Verifies SSL/TLS is enabled on all app environments

checks.name: Production Firewall
checks.description: Verifies restricted network policy is enabled on all app environments
